title: musa × sapientum var. cinerea
intro: Musa × sapientum var. cinerea, also known as the 'Dwarf Cavendish' banana, is a variety of banana plant. It belongs to the family Musaceae and is a type of edible banana that is commonly cultivated for its fruit and medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of the Musa × sapientum var. cinerea plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and are believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
